title: 高松宮記念の後に・あなたの背は

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(You always keep your head up no matter what.
Your image shines bright...)

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: This is my true poweeeer!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...King.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...I'm not done yet.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
If you truly wish to learn from me, then steel
yourself and watch me until the very end.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Did you see my graceful, magnificent
running?!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
That's the first-rate Umamusume we love! Are you
aiming to conquer the Dual Sprints again this
year?!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
You should quit while you're ahead and end your
career on a high note. Why keep fighting to
satisfy your ego? That won't help the newer
generation.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Only I have the right to make that decision.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But I will grant you the right to hear me speak! So
listen well!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
This is a world of victory and defeat. Today, I
crushed the dreams of many others to fulfill my
own.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
However, I am proud that I chose to enter this
race, and I do not feel I was selfish in the
slightest!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I take pride in making choices that represent who
I am! No matter what anyone else may say, this is
the path I tread!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! Go King Halo!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(...Yes, that's right. She's the role model I
desperately followed.)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
(She always shines so brightly, no matter what
pain burdens her.)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Earnest and unafraid, she has the courage to
move forward as herself.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...King.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You put in a great effort, but I duly bested you.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Y-yes. About that, I...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Even though you were my opponent, I do not regret the way I conducted myself today.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter how anyone views me. I made
my decisions in order to stay true to myself, and I
wouldn't call that selfishness.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's why if the day ever comes when we
compete again, I'll go all out and give you
another good thrashing.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I won't hold back, no matter my opponent. That's
how I show respect to those who challenge me.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Right. I'm looking forward to racing you again!
choice_data_list: Have you worked out your ideal self?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes, of course. The answer was within me all
along.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some days later, Kawakami Princess comes to me
with a proposal.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Before the Takamatsunomiya Kinen, King asked
me whether I felt pride in myself.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Whether I could take pride in my own actions.
Whether they reflect my true self.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
King's words made me realize something—staying
true to myself doesn't mean I'm being
self-centered. So I'll keep on moving forward...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: No matter what anyone else might think of me.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, for next month's Fan Fest, I want to take
part in this event.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess shows me a plan for a stage
event.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Last Year's Tiara Tour in Retrospect!" A talk
show presented by glamorous Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It seems the Umamusume I competed against last
year will be there, as well as all their fans.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A true princess wouldn't back down from an
opportunity like this just because she felt
intimidated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I see sincere determination burning in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But somewhere deeper, I sense a subtle tremor, a
trembling accompanied by an eagerness to grow.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Right.
